silent_query_interval_seconds.description: Interval between background silent polling rounds (seconds).

history_limit.description: Max retained latency history points per server.
history_limit.hint: Default 48 (about 24h if poll interval is 30m). Minimum 1.

status_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for a single MC status request (seconds).

query_all_concurrency.description: Max concurrent requests for '#查询服务器' (all servers).

avatar_download_retries.description: Retry count for each avatar download candidate.

skin_api_url_template.description: Skin API URL template used to fetch skin by UUID.
skin_api_url_template.hint: Must contain '{uuid}' placeholder. Invalid value falls back to default.
